question.title: 1966. Frequency of the Most Frequent Element

notes:
Used Sliding Window and Prefix Sum.
Incrementing consecutive numbers will let us choose more numbers and maximise the freq, therefore sort the array.
Use sliding window, increment right to increase size of window. Increment left to keep the window within constraint, i.e. max operations <= k. To keep track of constraint, we can calculate the no. of operations required in the window using prefix sum for efficiency.

enrichment.realTitle: 1966. Frequency of the Most Frequent Element
